name: Flávio Dias
title: Mechanical Engineer | Industrial Process Engineer
summary: Mechanical Engineer with experience in industrial process engineering within large-scale manufacturing environments. Background in process stabilization and improvement, industrial CAPEX management and manufacturing digitalization (MES), supporting engineering decisions through data analysis and operational performance indicators. Experience applying Lean Six Sigma (Green Belt), PDCA, DMAIC and Root Cause Analysis (RCA) directly on the shop floor (Gemba) to reduce defects, rework and process variability. Strong interface with engineering, production, maintenance, quality and suppliers. Fluent in English with experience presenting technical work internationally.

experience.title: Process Engineer
tasks: Functional lead for a mold renewal program with annual CAPEX of BRL 8 million, including technical justification, investment prioritization, supplier selection and engineering validation.
Direct shop-floor engagement diagnosing defects, performing root cause analysis and implementing corrective actions to stabilize and improve production processes.
Implementation of MES system for real-time monitoring and traceability of critical production process parameters.
Development of operational KPIs and analytical reports using Excel and Power BI to support performance analysis and engineering decision-making.
Industrial layout redesign improving production flow and integration between production, quality, engineering and maintenance teams.
International presentation of a technical case on MES integration and process stabilization at an overseas engineering conference.

experience.title: Engineering Analyst – Stamping and Tooling
tasks: Development and revision of stamping tools focusing on raw material waste reduction.
Creation of standardized operating procedures to improve process repeatability and control.
Improvement of chemical supply management using Excel tools for operational and inventory control.

experience.title: Industrial Analyst – Welding and Stamping
tasks: Technical support to welding and stamping operations through defect analysis and corrective action implementation.
Execution of PDCA improvement projects aimed at process stability and rework reduction.
Standardization of technical documentation and quality control procedures.

experience.title: Engineering Intern – Maintenance
tasks: Development of maintenance manuals and inspection checklists to improve operational reliability.
Creation of Power BI dashboards for maintenance performance indicators (OEE, MTBF, MTTR).
Automation of Excel tools for operational planning and activity management.

certifications: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt — Escola DNC
Project Manager & Scrum Master — Escola DNC

comments: Research on gear vibration with international publication in a Qualis A2 journal. Article: https://rdcu.be/ds3ID
